docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-10-2026, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, SERVICE FEE: $120.00 AS TO DEFENDANT 648 PACIFIC LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) PAUL SARMIENTO, SR. COLLECTIONS OFFICER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-18-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-18-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE FREDRICKS. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY PAUL SARMIENTO, SR. COLLECTION OFFICER. DEFENDANT 648 PACIFIC LLC IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,484.22 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT 648 PACIFIC LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-18-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-18-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 648 PACIFIC LLC $1,484.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,604.00, JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF V. DEFENDANT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE ON 01-APR-26. SMALL CLAIMS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO 648 PACIFIC LLC VIA COURT CERTIFIED MAIL. (ENVELOPE MARKED: RETURN TO SENDER - VACANT - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
